fields.title: skill-manage: validation helpers + tests
fields.description: Plan: docs/plans/2026-03-27-agentic-skill-creation.md — Task 2. Create validation.ts (validateName, validateFrontmatter, validateFilePath, checkInjectionPatterns) and validation.test.ts. Uses yaml package for frontmatter parsing.
fields.notes: Implemented extensions/tau/src/skill-manage/validation.ts and validation.test.ts. Added pure validators for skill names, SKILL.md frontmatter, file paths, and injection pattern detection. Verification: npx vitest run src/skill-manage/validation.test.ts 22/22 pass, npx tsc --noEmit clean, npm run gate 139/139 pass.
